title: Create: Bionics
description: A mod that adds robot animals to Create
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4ea6359c887a052b2a5ca2ef9508bfefcc6b750.png)

# Create Bionics
This is a mod that adds two robot animals to the Create mod. I plan on updating with more creatures in the future.

## Anole
This goofy little friend is perfect for joining your grand adventures, or just being a house pet. Not only can it be customized, (detailed in the summary below) but it can also transform into an item you can put in your inventory. That way it won't bug you if you're somewhere dangerous or important. It does, however, need fuel. This is a robot, after all.
![summary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/227d42ff5042382f46e5a19940bf8fe1c7d8dbce.png)
![anole recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67479350cc42bfe004bdd8ce2ea13eb024fa621d.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZjseZ1MbszI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Oxhauler
A large cow robot that you can ride like a horse and customize. When not ridden, it will stay wherever you leave it. Like the Anole, it needs fuel. Use coal or charcoal. You can customize your Oxhauler with copper or netherite ingots, as well as dye it to change its flag color.![Oxhauler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f60c15588d77638388784289caa0f29ec7978dc7.png)![Flags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5af8b027b8ed5cc7ec24806dbbca352f9cebaae9.png)
